title: drymonia microphylla
intro: Drymonia microphylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as an epiphytic orchid-like plant. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Drymonia microphylla is often prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
